title: Beginning Of The Club
description: The start of the club to create something great and do something different.

title: Third Place - IITP Virtual Playground-Game Development Challenge
description: Secured 3rd place in the Virtual Playground-Game Development Challenge 🎉. Theme was retro revive and we made a impossible pacman game.

title: First Place - IIITDM IEEE Paper Presentation
description: Secured 1st place in the IEEE Paper Presentation at Samgatha Vashisht 2025, IIITDM Kancheepuram! 🎉 Our research, 'Path Finding Algorithm A in Video Games and Integrating Artificial Intelligence,' explored optimizing AI-driven navigation for seamless and intelligent gameplay experiences.
competition: IEEE Paper Presentation at Samgatha Vashisht 2025, IIITDM Kancheepuram

title: First Place - Jabali Cricket Game Jam
description: Secured 1st place in the Jabali Cricket Game Jam. 🎉
